summary: Joe Reis shares a brief weekend newsletter highlighting a conversation about data strategy in the AI age, emphasizing that despite technological revolutions, success still depends on mastering the basics. The post primarily serves as a content roundup of weekend reads and podcast episodes.
key_points: Data strategy fundamentals remain constant despite AI hype
AI-generated content risks drowning the digital ecosystem in bad data
The basics of data engineering matter more than chasing new technology trends
money_quotes: The more things change, the more they stay the same. Success depends on the basics, no matter the latest technological revolution.
I'll discuss the implications of AI-generated content and a digital ecosystem drowning in bad data and software, and how to avoid this!
key_insight: Even as AI transforms the data landscape, mastering fundamental data engineering principles remains the key to success.
